archetypes.label: Loyal Customer
archetypes.behavior_template: Prefers incumbent unless compelling reason to switch. High inertia.

archetypes.label: Price-Sensitive Customer
archetypes.behavior_template: Switches to cheapest option. No brand loyalty. Compares constantly.

archetypes.label: Quality-First Customer
archetypes.behavior_template: Pays premium for best experience. Reads reviews. Slow to adopt.

archetypes.label: Competitor
archetypes.behavior_template: Reacts to your moves. May lower prices, copy features, or ignore.

archetypes.label: Market Analyst
archetypes.behavior_template: Publishes opinions that sway investor and customer sentiment.

archetypes.label: Investor
archetypes.behavior_template: Evaluates market moves through ROI lens. Can amplify or dampen signals.

archetypes.label: Regulator
archetypes.behavior_template: Slow to act but devastating when activated. Monitors for violations.
